apps.name: SNAKE
apps.author: ayoubfezzanii
apps.description: Classic snake game. Eat food, avoid walls and yourself. Use arrow keys to move.

apps.name: FOCUS
apps.author: ayoubfezzanii
apps.description: 25-minute focus timer with 5-minute breaks. Press Enter to start/pause.

apps.author: ayoubfezzanii
apps.description: Slide tiles to combine matching numbers and reach 2048. Arrow keys.

apps.name: TETRIS
apps.author: ayoubfezzanii
apps.description: Classic falling block puzzle. Up to rotate, Space to hard drop.

apps.name: ASTROIDS
apps.author: ayoubfezzanii
apps.description: Vector-style space shooter. Rotate, thrust, shoot rocks. Multiple levels.

apps.name: TIMER
apps.author: ayoubfezzanii
apps.description: Multiple parallel countdown timers. Picks: 1m, 5m, 10m, 25m, 1h. Saves between sessions.

apps.name: CRYPTO
apps.author: ayoubfezzanii
apps.description: Live BTC, ETH, SOL, ADA, DOGE prices with 24h change and tiny price chart.

apps.name: WIKI
apps.author: ayoubfezzanii
apps.description: Random Wikipedia article fetcher. Press N for next. Great for boredom and learning.
